description: Automation flow for processing new hire onboarding using AI and workflow orchestration

steps.name: New Hire Intake Trigger
steps.description: New employee data submitted through HRIS, Google Form, or onboarding portal

steps.name: Validate Record
steps.description: Check required fields such as employee name, manager, department, and start date

steps.name: AI Document Extraction
steps.description: Use LLM API to extract structured fields from uploaded onboarding documents

steps.name: Create Employee Profile
steps.description: Store normalized onboarding record in Airtable or HR database

steps.name: Generate Onboarding Tasks
steps.description: Automatically create tasks for HR, IT, and manager based on employee role

steps.name: Generate Personalized Onboarding Plan
steps.description: Use AI to create a role-specific onboarding plan and welcome summary

steps.name: Send Notifications
steps.description: Send onboarding summaries to HR and hiring manager via email or Slack

steps.name: Schedule Orientation
steps.description: Create onboarding meetings in Google Calendar or Outlook

steps.name: Milestone Monitoring
steps.description: Trigger onboarding milestone checks for Day 1, Week 1, and Month 1
